_comment: op/matmul wall-time ratios at n=128, node/V8, opt-level 3 wasm build. Re-recorded 2026-07-11 from runner run 29157035578 after the LIFO-rewind allocator upgrade (an intentional perf change: the old leak-only bump taxed allocation-heavy ops with cold pages + memory.grow in the timing loop, inflating faer's untuned default rows most — the 2026-07-09 baselines carried that tax). gate.mjs allows x3 drift either way.
